data.title: Funding Circle Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Funding Circle Holdings ( (GB:FCH) ) has shared an announcement.

Funding Circle Holdings plc has executed a buy-back of its own shares, purchasing 90,442 ordinary shares from Investec Bank plc on the London Stock Exchange. This transaction is part of a previously announced buy-back program, and the company plans to cancel the repurchased shares, resulting in a new total of 312,105,420 ordinary shares with voting rights. This move is likely aimed at optimizing the company’s capital structure and could potentially enhance shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FCH) stock is a Buy with a £1.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Funding Circle Holdings stock, see the GB:FCH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:FCH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:FCH is a Neutral.

Funding Circle Holdings Limited scores a 57.9, driven primarily by mixed financial performance and technical analysis indicating bearish momentum. The high P/E ratio suggests overvaluation, while recent share buybacks positively impact corporate perception. The company’s future stability hinges on improving cash flow and managing leverage.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:FCH stock, click here.

More about Funding Circle Holdings

Funding Circle Holdings plc operates in the financial services industry, primarily focusing on providing loans to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). The company leverages a technology-driven platform to connect SMEs with investors, facilitating access to capital for business growth.

Average Trading Volume: 790,671

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £323M

For an in-depth examination of FCH stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from WH Smith ( (GB:SMWH) ) is now available.

WH Smith PLC has announced the purchase of 46,264 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing buyback program, which was initiated in September 2024. This move is in line with the authority granted by shareholders earlier in January 2025, and the company plans to cancel these shares. Finsbury Gwth & Inc Shs ( (GB:FGT) ) has provided an update.

Finsbury Growth & Income Trust PLC has executed a market purchase of 47,500 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 906.37 pence per share. These shares will be held in treasury, increasing the total number of treasury shares to 80,780,471. Consequently, the total number of voting rights in the company is now 144,210,832, which shareholders can use as a denominator for calculating interests in voting rights according to FCA rules.

data.title: Milton Capital Pursues Strategic Energy Acquisition
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Milton Capital PLC ( (GB:MII) ) has provided an announcement.

Milton Capital PLC has announced its audited accounts for the year ending January 31, 2025, and is pursuing a reverse takeover (RTO) with Horizon Energy Global Corporation to acquire two UK private limited companies. This potential acquisition aims to separate Horizon’s European assets from its North American operations, with the enlarged group seeking admission to trading on AIM. Despite facing geopolitical and market challenges, Milton remains committed to growing its value for stakeholders and believes in the long-term role of natural gas in energy transition.

Spark’s Take on GB:MII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MII is a Underperform.

Milton Capital PLC’s overall stock score is hindered by severe operational challenges, including no revenue generation and negative cash flow. While the balance sheet shows some stability due to the absence of debt, the lack of income sustainability is a critical risk. Technical analysis provides some hope for price recovery, but bearish momentum persists. The potential acquisition of Horizon Energy’s subsidiaries presents a strategic opportunity, but its impact remains speculative. Overall, the stock is currently a high-risk investment with uncertain prospects.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MII stock, click here.

More about Milton Capital PLC

Milton Capital PLC is a Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC) focused on the energy sector. The company is actively seeking acquisition opportunities, particularly in the realm of energy transition, and aims to transform into a significant player in the energy industry.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Fineqia International ( (TSE:FNQ) ) has provided an update.

Fineqia AG, a European subsidiary of Fineqia International, has partnered with Apex Group to administer its crypto-backed Exchange Traded Products (ETPs). This collaboration aims to enhance the management of Fineqia AG’s ETPs with institutional-grade rigor, aligning with global regulatory standards and ensuring transparency and operational efficiency for investors. The partnership is expected to bolster Fineqia AG’s position in the digital asset market, particularly with the recent launch of its innovative Fineqia FTSE Cardano Enhanced Yield ETN, which has already attracted significant assets under management.

However, recent strategic initiatives and partnerships in the digital asset space offer potential future growth opportunities, slightly offsetting the negative financial performance.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FNQ stock, click here.

More about Fineqia International

Fineqia International Inc. is a digital asset and investment firm publicly listed in Canada, with additional listings on Nasdaq and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. The company provides institutional-grade exposure to blockchain-based decentralized finance (DeFi) opportunities. Its European subsidiary, Fineqia AG, issues crypto asset-backed Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) and has investments in businesses involved in tokenizing real-world assets, decentralized applications, DeFi, and blockchain protocols.

Chunghwa Telecom Co ( (CHT) ) has provided an announcement.

On May 29, 2025, Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. held its Annual General Meeting where several key resolutions were passed. The meeting ratified the 2024 earnings distribution proposal, approving a cash dividend of NT$5.0 per share, and authorized amendments to the company’s Articles of Incorporation. Additionally, the election of the company’s 11th term directors was conducted, appointing 13 directors, including 5 independent directors. The meeting also approved the release of non-competition restrictions on the directors and noted the expiration of the term for the company’s Compensation Committee.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CHT is a Outperform.

Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading telecommunications company based in Taiwan, providing a wide range of services including fixed-line, mobile, and broadband internet services. The company plays a significant role in the telecommunications industry in Taiwan, focusing on delivering advanced communication solutions to its customers.
